name: Vegetable Stew with Dolma
recipeIngredient: 1 carrot - cut in half, then lengthwise several white radishes
2 cup firm white fish - ground or finely min
1/4 cup white rice - raw short grain
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onions in oil until soft.
2. Add all the vegetables and spices, except cilantro and zucchini, and stock. Bring to a boil, reduce heat and simmer.
3. Make the dolma balls while it's simmering. When vegetables are half cooked add the dolma gently, one at a time, on a spoon. Ensure they are well covered with liquid as they will double in size. Add a little water or stock if needed to cover. Let simmer for 10 minutes.
4. Add zucchini and cilantro and simmer until balls are firm and rice is soft. Check while cooking and add more liquid if needed.
